## Summary

What changed and why?

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Dependency update
- [ ] Breaking change

## Checklist

- [ ] PR is focused and reasonably small
- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] Lint/typecheck/tests pass locally or in CI
- [ ] Docs/examples updated if behavior changed
- [ ] Public API changes are clearly described
- [ ] Semver impact is noted
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, private URLs, or debug logs
- [ ] New dependencies are justified

## Release notes

Semver impact: patch / minor / major / none
